---
title: "Field Day 2026"
subtitle: "Report"
---

## 

![](include/img/w3ya-field-day-map.png)

##

![](include/img/w3ya-field-day-2026-map.png)

## 

![](include/img/field-day-site-1.png)

##

![<https://aprs.fi/#!z=11&call=a%2FW3YA-12&timerange=3600&tail=3600>](include/img/field-day-w3ya-12-apris.fi.png)

## 

![K3CWP, K3JEG, KC3MVL, W3SWL](include/img/field-day-2026-1.jpg)

##

![W3TM](include/img/field-day-2026-2.jpg)

## 

![](include/img/field-day-2026-info-table.jpeg)

##

![KD3CCO](include/img/field-day-2026-kd3cco.jpeg)

## 

![](include/fig/fig-score-by-year-1.png)

##

![](include/fig/fig-qsos-by-year-1.png)

## 

![](include/fig/fig-qsos-by-year-recent-1.png)

## 

![](include/fig/fig-bonus-by-year-1.png)

##

![](include/fig/fig-bonus-proportion-by-year-1.png)

## Bonus points

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=50%}
- Winlink message to ARRL Section Manager
- 10 Winlink messages
- Safety Officer
- Elected Official visit; agency official visit
- Social media
:::
::: {.column width=50%}
- Youth operator
- Web submission
- Info table
- Public location
- Educational activity
:::
::::

## It takes a village...

```{r}
#| echo: false

generate_callsign_url <- function(callsign="W3TM") {
  assertthat::is.string(callsign)
  paste0("<a href='https://www.hamqth.com/s.php?callsign=", callsign, "'>", callsign, "</a>")
}

setup <- c("W3TM", "W3EDP", "K3YV", "KD3CCO", "WA8MTZ", "N3LI", "KC3MVL", "KM3AJ", "KD3CCP", "K3CWP", "W3SWL")
food <- c("KD3AQC", "K3JEG", "KF0JZM", "KD3CPR")
bonus <- c("KB1BH", "N3IW")
ops <- c("WA7HUB", "KD3BHE")
visitors <- c("WB3AEI", "KC3JRV", "AC3V", "W3RPA", "KB3CTG", "K3ABR", "K3IWI")

hams <- c(setup, food, bonus, ops, visitors) |> 
  unique() |> 
  sort()

data.frame(hams)|>
  dplyr::mutate(hams = generate_callsign_url(hams)) |>
  kableExtra::kbl(format = "html", escape = FALSE)
```

## Next year

- [Winter Field Day](https://winterfieldday.org), January 23-24, 2027
- ARRL Field Day, June 26-27, 2027.
